localized_texts.text: FunPark Gamuda Luge Gardens Ticket

Experience the ultimate in fun and excitement with the FunPark Gamuda Luge Gardens FunPass. Enjoy unlimited access to all the thrilling rides and attractions, from the exhilarating luge track to the exciting playground and carousel. Create unforgettable memories with friends and family as you explore the diverse offerings at FunPark. With the FunPass, you're guaranteed a day filled with laughter, adventure, and endless possibilities.
Experience a wide range of thrilling rides, exciting games, and family-friendly activities
Enjoy unlimited access to all rides and attractions at FunPark, maximizing your enjoyment
Get the most out of your visit with the FunPass, offering excellent value for your money
Create lasting memories with friends and family as you explore FunPark exciting attractions

Get ready for a day filled with non-stop fun and excitement at FunPark Gamuda Luge Gardens. With the FunPass, you'll have unlimited access to all the thrilling rides and attractions, including the exhilarating luge track, exciting playground, and family-friendly carousel. Explore the diverse offerings at your own pace and create unforgettable memories with friends and family. Enjoy a day of laughter, adventure, and endless possibilities with the FunPark FunPass.
Restriction: Please review the rules and regulations for all FunPark rides
Restriction: You can purchase tickets for babies and children at the FunPark Ticketing Counter
Restriction: A child is considered anyone between the ages of 0 and 16
Restriction: Adults and teenagers (17 years and older) will pay the same price
Restriction: Children under 120cm tall must be accompanied by an adult (16 years or older)
What’s included: Admission to  Fun Park Gamuda Ticket
What’s included: Unlimited pay-per-rides in a day
What’s included: Fun Park ride include Carousel, Jellycup Twist, Fully Frenzy, Jumpshot, Vroomerang or Eye of Gardens
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing Counter

Terms & Conditions: Some rides have specific height and weight limits for safety reasons. Children under 120cm tall must be accompanied by an adult who is at least 16 years old. Children aged below 1 year are to be FOC with a paying adult. FREE park admission applies only to children aged below 1 year with a paying adult. (i.e., if the children turn 1 in 2025, a ticket is required for the visitation date from 1 January 2025 to 31 December 2025) People aged 17 and older will pay the same price as adults. A child is considered anyone from 1 to 16 years old. Please review the Fun Park's rules and regulations for more information. Guests in wheelchairs may need to transfer to the ride vehicle seat. Guests cannot bring outside food or drinks into the park. Dangerous items like bottles, firecrackers, and lasers are not allowed. Only service animals with proper identification are allowed. Smoking and drinking are prohibited in the park. If caught, you may be asked to leave.General Park Rules & Regulations Follow Ride Instructions: 1. Always follow the instructions given by ride operators, including how to board and exit the ride/attraction, as well as safety guidelines. Ensure to always keep all body parts inside the ride/attraction. Height, Weight and Age Restrictions: 2. Amusement parks have rides with different classes of height, weight, and age restrictions for safety reasons. Make sure to adhere to these restrictions to ensure a safe and enjoyable experience. Secure Loose Items: 3. Secure loose items such as hats, sunglasses, and cell phones before getting on a ride/attraction to prevent them from falling and causing injury or damage. Dress Code: 4. Dress appropriately and avoid clothing with loose straps or dangling accessories that could get caught in rides/attractions. Stay Hydrated: 5. Drink plenty of water to stay hydrated, especially on hot days. No Smoking & Vaping: 6. Smoking and Vaping is prohibited in ride queues, on rides, or other non-designated areas. No Alcohol or Drugs: 7. Alcohol and drugs are prohibited to maintain a safe and family-friendly environment. Respect Queues: 8. Don't cut queues. Wait your turn and be courteous to others. Use Trash Bins: 9. Dispose of trash in designated bins and help keep the park clean. Supervise Children: 10. If you have young children with you, always keep an eye on them and make sure they follow the rules and safety guidelines. Listen to Announcements: 11. Pay attention to announcements over the public address system for important information or changes in park operations. Photo and Video Policies: 12. Be aware of the park's photography and video recording policies, especially on rides. Respect the privacy of others when taking photos or videos
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
